popularStory.headline: Biography, Judhael de Totnes, 1st Lord Barnstable
popularStory.description: This church was probably originally built by Juhel de Totnais, its Norman owner, concerning whom little is known; but it is certain that he was a pious and religious man, and that he founded the prior …

zh.Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Mayenn: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Judhael de Totnes於1049年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易時，他的父親Alured de Mayenne34歲，母親Bridget de Barnstaple29歲。他和Bertha de Picquigny至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1123年在英國英格蘭戴文巴恩斯塔普爾享年74歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Totnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Towns
meanings: English (northern): variant of Town , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Judhael de Totnes was born in 1049, in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Alured de Mayenne, was 34 and his mother, Bridget de Barnstaple, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Bertha de Picquigny. He died in 1123, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judhael de Totnes est né en 1049, à Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Alured de Mayenne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Bridget de Barnstaple, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Bertha de Picquigny. Il est décédé en 1123, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judhael de Totnes 1049 in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alured de Mayenne 34 und seine Mutter Bridget de Barnstaple 29. Er hatte mit Bertha de Picquigny mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1123 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judhael de Totnes è nato il nel 1049 nel Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Alured de Mayenne, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Bridget de Barnstaple, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Bertha de Picquigny. Morì nel 1123, nel Barnstaple, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Judhael de Totnesが1049年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーで生まれた時，父Alured de Mayenneは34歳，母Bridget de Barnstapleは29歳であった。彼はBertha de Picquignyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1123年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーンスタプルで74歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーンスタプル スト マリー マグダリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나
ko.Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Mayenn: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Judhael de Totnes(이)가 1049년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alured de Mayenne(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget de Barnstaple(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Bertha de Picquigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바른스타플에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judhael de Totnes nasceu em 1049, em Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Alured de Mayenne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Bridget de Barnstaple, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Bertha de Picquigny. Ele faleceu em 1123, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Mayenn: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judhael de Totnes родился в 1049 г. в местности меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Alured de Mayenne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Bridget de Barnstaple, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Bertha de Picquigny. Он умер в 1123 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстапл ст мэри магдеилин, девон, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Bertha de Picquigny. Murió en 1123, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.
